summary: Get Advanced Forecasting Rows of a Project
description: Get Advanced forecasting rows. Each page will have a maximum of 100 items.

parameters.name: budget_view_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the Budget View (also known as Budget Template). Required to return spread amount for other curves besides manual.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description:
Array structure to filter the result of the advanced forecasting endpoint
Supported filter objects (with and without budget_view_id):
  - WBS segment item filter
    Structure:
      - id: <segment...

tier.description: Tier of the Segment if applicable

data.description: Array of Advanced forecasting summarized rows

start_date.description: The start date of the line item

end_date.description: The end date of the line item

curve.description: The curve of the line item. For more information about the curve distribution visit https://support.procore.com/faq/how-do-procores-advanced-forecasting-curves-distribute-projected-cost-to-complete...

forecast_to_complete.description: The forecast to complete of the line item

periods.description: The periods of the line item
